title: Outlook Calendar Integrtion

posts.author: RichardT (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we are just starting to use the outlook calendar integration so that when an event is created in the calendar it creates an item in the board and synchs future changes from outlook calendar.

This seems to work ok expect that when a meeting invite is accepted a second item is created on the board. Other changes to the calendar items such as appointment or meetings times do not create a second item, just accepting a meeting.

Is this something I may have missed or expected behaviour.

Thanks in advance,

posts.author: Hizak (Hizak)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi , We have faced the same result while accepting invites on our calendars. we have tried the Google calendar integration as it accepts the status of the event and updates the existing item when accepted. It would be great to get a solution for the Outlook integration as same.
